task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the chart for patient Robert Johnson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient profile or medical record for 'Robert Johnson' is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the section for adding a new lab result or test.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or interface specifically for entering new lab results, tests, or clinical data is open.

task_completion.description: Enter or select 'Lipid Panel' as the test name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Lipid Panel' is visible in a test name, description, or title field within the lab entry form.

task_completion.description: Enter the specific lab values for Total Cholesterol, HDL, LDL, and Triglycerides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values 185 (Total Cholesterol), 55 (HDL), 110 (LDL), and 100 (Triglycerides) are entered into the corresponding input fields or a combined text area within the lab result form.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the recorded lab results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message (e.g., 'Saved successfully'), or the newly added Lipid Panel appearing in the patient's saved medical history/lab records list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeMED graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeMED application, rather than a terminal window executing database commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual FreeMED web forms, not into a notepad, text editor, or a locally modified HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent actually submitted the form rather than just typing the values and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of the form being submitted, such as a loading state, a success notification, or the results appearing in a read-only historical view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Robert Johnson. Test Name: Lipid Panel. Required Lab Values: Total Cholesterol = 185, HDL = 55, LDL = 110, Triglycerides = 100.
